request.system:
你是一个用于 PDF 原位回填的精修助手。
你处理的是已经翻译过、但版面过紧的文本块。
你的目标不是重写内容，而是在尽量不损失信息和正式风格的前提下，做最小必要压缩。
只返回 JSON，不要输出任何解释。

文档场景：上市公司年度报告翻译与逐页版面回填
目标风格：正式、审慎、可披露、接近已发布英文年报

动态文档背景：
- 章节线索：我們的目標 | 目錄 | 友邦保險一覽 | 2020 年里程碑 | 概覽 | 2020年業績一覽(1) | 2020年按市場分部劃分 | 主席報告 | 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 | 財務及營運回顧
- 导航线索：概覽 | 財務及營運回顧 | 企業管治 | 其他資料 | 財務報表
- 高频术语：友邦保險 -> AIA | 新業務價值 -> new business value | 稅後營運溢利 -> operating profit after tax | 內涵價值 -> embedded value | 有效保單組合 -> in-force portfolio | 代理渠道 -> agency channel | 夥伴分銷 -> partnership distribution | 銀行保險 -> bancassurance | 中國內地 -> Mainland China | 中國台灣 -> Taiwan | 新加坡 -> Singapore | 泰國 -> Thailand
- 这是上市公司年度报告语境，译文要保持年报/财报正式书面表达，不使用口语化或营销化措辞。
- 文档包含财务表格、比率和金额，数字、百分比、币种、年份及缩写必须严格保留。
- 文档包含目录或侧边导航，导航项宜使用固定、稳定、可复用的正式译法。
- 文档存在大量章节标题，标题应优先贴近正式已发布年报的写法，并尽量避免不必要换行。
- 公司历史语料：AIA Group
- 历史固定标题参考（只复用译法语义，不强制大小写和换行）：企業管治 -> Corporate Governance | 財務及營運回顧 -> Financial and Operating Review
- 优先沿用该公司历史年报中已经稳定出现的栏目标题、导航名和管理层头衔译法。
- 若当前页面与历史年报中的页面形态接近，应优先参考该公司惯用的标题长度、表格标签写法和正式披露语气。
- 若历史英文标题采用全大写或特殊分行展示，仅借鉴其正式措辞，不强制沿用大小写和换行样式。
- 历史近似页面：
-   2020 p65 [contents_like] (无标题)
-   2022 p15 [dense_narrative] (无标题)
-   2022 p19 [dense_narrative] (无标题)

受保护信息：
- 数字
- 百分比
- 货币
- 年份
- 日期
- 专有名词
- 公司名
- 人名
- 地名
- 图表微标签
- 页码

硬约束：
- 只做最小幅度缩短，不要摘要化，不要改成分析师速记风格。
- 不要随意缩写正式标题、栏目名、导航项、图表标签、页眉页脚。
- 如果原文是完整句，优先保持完整句。
- block_id 必须原样保留。
- 返回格式：{"translations": [{"block_id": "...", "translation": "..."}]}

messages.content:
以下文本块版面过紧。请在不改变核心含义和正式风格的前提下，仅做最小必要压缩。
不要摘要，不要解释，只输出严格 JSON。
{
  "page_no": 13,
  "source_language": "Traditional Chinese",
  "target_language": "English",
  "problem_blocks": [
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b1",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "友邦保險是客戶誠可信賴的夥伴，讓客戶在關注財務安全和家庭保障時仍可安心無憂。儘管2019冠狀病毒病大",
      "current_translation": "AIA is a trusted partner for our customers, enabling them to focus on financial security and family protection with peace of mind. Despite the profound impact of the COVID-19 pandemic,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.756,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 50,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        94.7,
        524.09,
        106.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b2",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "流行的影響深遠，但我衷心感謝我們的員工、代理和合作夥伴在適應新工作方式並確保為客戶提供無間斷的支援",
      "current_translation": "I am deeply grateful to our employees, agents and partners for their flexibility and dedication in adapting to new ways of working and ensuring uninterrupted support to our customers",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.767,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        110.7,
        521.48,
        122.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b5",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "自疫情大流行開始以來，本集團的各業務團隊反應迅速，積極協助紓緩對社區的影響，同時確保員工安全。本集",
      "current_translation": "Since the onset of the pandemic, our business teams across the Group have responded swiftly and actively worked to mitigate the impact on our communities while ensuring employee safety. The Group has",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.673,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        158.71,
        521.41,
        170.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b6",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "團為此廣泛採取多項措拖，包括財政支持、提供醫療物資、免費保障覆蓋、獲取醫療保健資源、精簡服務流程和",
      "current_translation": "implemented a comprehensive range of measures, including financial support, provision of medical supplies, complimentary coverage, access to healthcare resources, streamlined service processes and",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.687,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        174.71,
        521.58,
        186.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b7",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "加快理賠支付，令我引以為榮。我們一如既往找出每一個可以作出理賠的理由，年內已支付逾160億美元的保險",
      "current_translation": "accelerated claims payments, which I am proud of. We continue to find every reason to pay claims, and during the year we paid out over USD 16 billion in insurance benefits and claims,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.725,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 50,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        190.71,
        521.57,
        202.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b9",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "儘管為遏制2019冠狀病毒病傳播的措施導致新業務價值減少至27.65億美元，但隨著外出限制放寬，銷售動力轉",
      "current_translation": "Although measures to contain the COVID-19 pandemic resulted in new business value declining to USD 2.765 billion, as restrictions on movement eased, sales momentum turned positive and",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.698,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 53,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        238.72,
        521.52,
        250.67
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b10",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "趨正面，並在2021年展開非常強勁的勢頭，首兩個月的新業務價值按年增長15%。我們規模龐大和持續增長的有",
      "current_translation": "gathered very strong momentum in 2021, with new business value in the first two months growing 15% year-on-year. Our large and growing in-force portfolio continues to generate high-quality and",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.71,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 52,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        254.72,
        521.56,
        266.67
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b11",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "效保單組合所帶來的高質素和經常性收入來源，帶動2020年稅後營運溢利增加5%，期內產生的基本自由盈餘則",
      "current_translation": "recurring income streams, driving a 5% increase in operating profit after tax in 2020, while free surplus generated during the period grew 7%. As at 31 December 2020, embedded value equity reached",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.696,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        270.72,
        521.55,
        282.67
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b14",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "董事會建議2020年末期股息增加7.5%至每股100.30港仙。這秉承友邦保險行之已久的審慎、可持續及漸進的派息",
      "current_translation": "The Board recommends a final dividend for 2020 of HKD 100.30 per share, representing a 7.5% increase. This reflects AIA's long-standing prudent, sustainable and progressive dividend",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.721,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 56,
      "bbox": [
        68.04,
        334.73,
        521.51,
        346.68
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b15",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "政策，讓本集團可把握未來的增長機遇，並且保持財務靈活性。",
      "current_translation": "policy, enabling the Group to capture future growth opportunities while maintaining financial flexibility.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.782,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 28,
      "bbox": [
        68.04,
        350.73,
        326.12,
        362.68
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b17",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "平台，並於我們業務所在的大部分市場雄踞領導地位。我們始終如一地百分百專注於亞洲市場，有助我們在全球",
      "current_translation": "platform in the region and hold leading market positions in most of our operating markets. Our consistent and exclusive focus on Asia has enabled us to capture growth opportunities across the world's",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.697,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.04,
        398.74,
        521.46,
        410.69
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b20",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "我們無可比擬的分銷實力能直接接觸客戶，並提供高質素的專業建議，協助滿足亞洲消費者龐大且日益增長的長",
      "current_translation": "Our unparalleled distribution strength enables direct customer engagement and delivery of high-quality professional advice to meet the substantial and growing long-term protection and",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.728,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.04,
        462.74,
        521.5,
        474.7
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b21",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "期保障和儲蓄需求。如今大眾比以往更期望企業能以符合長遠可持續發展的方式應對他們的需要。友邦保險擁有",
      "current_translation": "savings needs of Asian consumers. Today, customers increasingly expect companies to address their needs in ways that are aligned with long-term sustainable development. AIA has a",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.725,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.04,
        478.75,
        521.5,
        490.7
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b23",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "我們旨在使友邦保險在科技應用方面領先全球，加強互聯互通，擴大規模和提升效率。更深入瞭解數據分析有助",
      "current_translation": "We are committed to positioning AIA as a global leader in technology application, enhancing connectivity, scaling our operations and improving efficiency. Deeper insights from data analytics enable",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.678,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.04,
        526.75,
        521.46,
        538.7
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b24",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "我們締造獨特和個人化的客戶體驗。切合和反映個人需求和生活方式的產品及服務，改變了大眾對人壽保險的看",
      "current_translation": "us to create unique and personalized customer experiences. Products and services tailored to and reflective of individual needs and lifestyles are transforming how people view life insurance and",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.717,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.04,
        542.75,
        521.5,
        554.71
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b26",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "儘管2020年是前所未見的一年，但我對亞洲壽險行業的前景和友邦保險的未來比以往更為樂觀。我們繼續挑戰自",
      "current_translation": "While 2020 was an unprecedented year, I am more optimistic than ever about the prospects for the Asian life insurance industry and the future of AIA. We continue to challenge ourselves and",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.702,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        68.04,
        590.76,
        521.57,
        602.71
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p13_b27",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "己，發展我們的優先任務，以確保我們能繼續適切地迎合客戶期望和財務需求的轉變。我們的全新企業策略建基",
      "current_translation": "develop our strategic priorities to ensure we continue to appropriately address evolving customer expectations and financial needs. Our new corporate strategy builds on AIA's existing strengths and",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.705,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.04,
        606.76,
        521.46,
        618.71
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    }
  ]
}
